title: Ad Astra: Planet Screen Expanded
description: A scripted expansion of Ad Astra's planet screen.
body:
Expands Ad Astra's planet screen functionalities.


**FEATURES**

- Data-driven dynamic solar system rendering using .json files!

- Support for moons, and other orbiting objects, around planets.

- "Selected overlay" for when choosing where to land (making it easier to know what planet you selected).

- Independent orbiting times, sizes and distances.

- Some other thing or two I maybe forgot to include here.

The addon was made using KubeJS, but **there is no need for scripting when using this.**

This comes with **already configured** .json files for Ad Astras's two solar systems.

**For more info see the [wiki](https://github.com/LittleWindow/Ad_Astra_Planet_Screen_Expanded/wiki).**
